allow: Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./src/data/all-optimized_tec.json'\); const tech = data.find\(t => t.id === 'silk-bowstrings'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({effects: tech?.effects, v0effects: tech?.variations?.[0]?.effects}, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./src/data/all-optimized_tec.json'\); const arr = Object.values\(data\).flat\(\); const tech = arr.find\(t => t && t.id === 'silk-bowstrings'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({effects: tech?.effects, v0effects: tech?.variations?.[0]?.effects}, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/all-unified.json'\); const u = d.find\(u => u.id === 'wynguard-footman'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(u?.variations?.map\(v => \({age: v.age, costs: v.costs}\)\), null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/all-unified.json'\); const arr = Array.isArray\(d\) ? d : Object.values\(d\).flat\(\); const u = arr.find\(u => u.id === 'wynguard-footman'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(u?.variations?.map\(v => \({age: v.age, costs: v.costs}\)\), null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/all-optimized_tec.json'\); const t = d.data.find\(t => t.id === 'armor-clad'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(t?.effects, null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/all-optimized_tec.json'\); const t = d.data.find\(t => t.id === 'armor-clad'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(t?.variations?.[0]?.effects, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const raw=fs.readFileSync\('src/data/all-unified.json','utf8'\);const d=JSON.parse\(raw\);console.log\(typeof d, Array.isArray\(d\), Object.keys\(d\).slice\(0,5\)\);")

hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); matched=bool(re.search(r'(combat\.ts|abilities\.ts|technologies\.ts|units\.ts|Sandbox\.tsx|UnitCard\.tsx|useUnitSlot\.ts)$', f)); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'[CLAUDE.md REMINDER] You just edited a key file. Check if CLAUDE.md needs updating (interfaces, function signatures, new state, new mechanics). Update the relevant section before finishing.'}})) if matched else None"
